1734480.name: Neondrops
1734480.description:
Neon drops is a synthesizer, sampler, and midi controller all in one that utilizes your mice and keyboards.

Features
  • 120+ instruments
  • Up to a total of 8 mice and keyboards can send unique MIDI signals to the internal synthesizer or your DAW
  • Record up to 16 seconds of playback to try out new musical ideas
  • 15 musical scales included
  • Slice and flip your own music and recordings (mono 48khz)
  • Block input to foreground applications
  • Use the Game port to send keys to supported applications
  • MIDI IN Support

Controls
  • Tilde - QUIT
  • Ctrl + Space + Shift- MINIMIZE / MAXIMIZE
  • Shift + WASDQE - NAV / SELECT / NEXT PAGE / PREV PAGE
  • Space - CHORD MODE
  • 4,5,6,+,1,2,3,Numpad enter - SAMPLE PADS 1-8
  • Numpad 0 - SAMPLE PADS 9-16 WHEN 16 SLICES IS ON
  • \ - RECORD
